programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and Silky mistakenly draw unwanted attention to the Crabs from the Gulls.
Baba, Pip and Pop spend the day together, but Pip keeps getting left out!
Happy feels frustrated when Olivia tries to make everything perfect.
Piggyback: The Heelers take a late afternoon walk by the river, but Bingo decides she's too tired to walk any further and needs a piggyback.
Jermaine Fire and Magic Show: Jermaine shows up at school with new magic tricks. He gets nervous when trying to do a trick with Leia and ends up vanishing.
Meta Metamorphosis: Oswaldo, Leia and Tobias meet Danix, a rebel who wants to teach them how to be rebel themselves.
Grandpere is visiting Daniel and they are baking raisin bread together. Daniel learns that sometimes it's good to take your time, and it can be worth the wait.
Oxygen & Hydrogen try to build the world's biggest snowman, but a runaway snowball soon threatens the whole town.
Deed encourages a friend to say 'socks' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure!
Glitch wants to ski, so the Grimbots give Table Mountain a snowy peak, which threatens its rare plants.
Mojo and Bo need to get Felix, Dot, and Nan's giant pie all across the lake at once. But Felix wants the pie and Dot wants Felix, so it'll take some creative puzzle-solving!
Astro Zero: Quasar is heartbroken: without his Astro-Punch, he's not allowed to be an Astro Hero! Thinking he's no good without it, he loses all confidence...
What a kind Piggy!: Greenbeard asks Piglet to find him a map of the attic and, very proud of his trick, takes advantage of the fact that his back is turned to rob his shop.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Lex's Café: Lex and Plu have had bad luck with customers and decide to take the day off. After heading to Boris's, Lex finds out that Boris wants to take the day off, so he offers to fill in.
A Puzzling Chicken: In the annual puzzle competition, Odo and Doodle are unexpectadly teamed.
The Dream: Odo relates to the campers a superhero dream that he had... but he woke up before the dream ended and now the campers are all desperate to hear how the dream turned out.
Baking a pie becomes a lot to juggle until Hugo and Sonia learn to focus on one task at a time. (SL)
When Sonia forgets to bring Dino to a playdate, she discovers he's having his own special adventure at home. (SL)
Sing Wet Automatic: Fuzzy Yellow and Marzipan discover musical puddles, but the music they make doesn't appeal to their friend Moon. (SL)
Oona and Silky mistakenly draw unwanted attention to the Crabs from the Gulls.
Baba, Pip and Pop spend the day together, but Pip keeps getting left out!
Happy feels frustrated when Olivia tries to make everything perfect.
Downhill Racers: It's the annual Pop Paper City go kart race, and Zip has chosen the racecourse. Can Zip make this year's go-kart race the best one yet?
Henry meets a friendly Mountain. He has a nasty itch that he just can't scratch and it's up to Henry to save the day.
Bus Train: Cynthia's bus is having an upgrade, so Stanley creates a special bus out of different vehicles to take everyone to their classes at the community centre.
Bell: The old bell at the Town Hall has lost its 'ding-dong' so Stanley is enrolled to make a new modern one.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Láiblín Lofa: Tá paisinéir Láiblín i bhfolach ar bord Shelby - agus beidh ar Adam agus an criú 'boladh thar a bheith bréan' a chruthú chun an praiseach seo a ghlanadh suas.
Balla na bPéisteanna: Tá péisteanna ollmhóra ag gluaiseacht go tapa trasna pláinéad nua a bhfuil cuma cháise air agus tá Adam buartha go bhfuil siad faoi strus ag iódalú Bubby
Brewster, Maggie, and Ginger talk about what keeps them warm in the snow.
Brewster and his friends wonder about the other half of the moon while using Brewster's new telescope to look at it.
Tá Grampy Rabbit ag caint leis na páistí faoi dhreapadóireacht san ionad dreapadóireachta.
Tá Peppa, George agus Freddy Fox amuigh sa mbád in éineacht le Grandpa. Tá siad ag spraoi foghlaithe mara.
A live show will be taking place in Tír na nÓg where everyone will have the chance to show off their talents. Oisín is figuring out what his talent is.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
With the support of her friends, Diva discovers she can dance, even though she thought it was impossible.
Wrong Tag: Reggie, waking up later than usual, had red eyes, a fever, and a rash. Despite Maya advising Reggie to rest, Reggie sneaks out to play while Maya is away.
Andy And The Jackson's Widowbird: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Brazil to take photos of a family of marmosets
Mojo and Bo need to get Felix, Dot, and Nan's giant pie all across the lake at once. But Felix wants the pie and Dot wants Felix, so it'll take some creative puzzle-solving!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Diesels Bad Day: When Diesel's bad behavior threatens to ruin a big delivery, Bruno figures out why his friend is upset and how to help.
The Treasure Indoors: Maddie and Triggs are bored. It's been raining for what seems like forever and they want to play outside!

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Shooting Stars: Explorers Amy, Jack and Leon visit Nina in her workshop and discover that shooting stars are not stars at all - they are meteors.
Mission: Catwalk: Tinks uses her super fetch skills and big dog energy.
Cá Bhfuil Neamaí?: Tá Neamaithe ag preabadh aníos ar fud Phláinéad BeddyByes agus tá MeMo agus BaBa ag baint spórt as iad a aimsiú.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Mossy decides to get a place of his own. How will he cope without the shrew crew?
The Puffin Burrow floods, so Oona and Baba stay with May until it dries out.
Happy deals with big guilty feelings when there's a dancing-related tumble in Sunny River.
The Show: When Bingo drops Mum's breakfast-in-bed on the floor, she's convinced she's ruined her big day. But Bluey helps make amends by putting on a play of how Mum and Dad first met.
Life and Death of Charlie Fisher: Tobias is sad because he lost his pet Charlie Fisher and Oswaldo also catches the sadness.
My Fair Oswaldo: Oswaldo gets help from Janet to learn how to be classy for a gala dinner.
Daniel's class is going on a nature walk. The group learns that sometimes it's good to go slow: seeing, hearing, and smelling the environment around you.
Sulfur & Phosphorus become unlikely helpers when Lithium tries to put on a circus act, but is she good enough and can she keep her nerve?
Deed encourages a friend to say 'cow' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
Ubercorn is excited to see the Northern Lights, but Glitch's Grunge-Grimbler covers them with smoke. Cartoon following four superheroes as they explore the world.
Mojo and Bo need to move a crashed meteor. But every time Mojo goes near the big rock, moving turns to grooving. How can you move a meteor if you can't stop dancing?
Double trouble: Ollie is determined to play in the Mini-Tennis final with Bella! She ropes in Teeny Rex and Cephy to help with the cleaning...
Pigglywig's Very Bad Day: Pigglywig, Attic Town's coolest resident, is in a terrible mood! His friends don't understand why, which only makes things worse...

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Supergoose: Lex and Plu meet Alex Sketch, an unusual figure who, like Plu, is a fan of Supergoose. Alex has decided to be the hero for this galaxy.
Friends Forever: When Odo discovers that sometimes friendships change, he and Doodle try to find a way to avoid ever being separated.
Lord Of The Flyers: Pigeon Post is left in charge of the camp for the day.
By trying to save a bubble from popping, Hugo and Sonia remember what made the game fun in the first place. (SL)
Sonia and Hugo learn the value in being themselves while trying to copy Mom, Dad, Mel and Poi. (SL)
Sunflower Sky Pillow: Fuzzy Yellow and Patoto wish for a different kind of rain that isn't wet. Wisp the cloud tries various surprising ways to fulfill that wish. (SL)
Mossy decides to get a place of his own. How will he cope without the shrew crew?
The Puffin Burrow floods, so Oona and Baba stay with May until it dries out.
Happy deals with big guilty feelings when there's a dancing-related tumble in Sunny River.
Hooper DooperLand: Hooper and Helping Hand are building an amazing theme park - Hooper Dooper Land! But when things don't go to plan, can Hooper make Hooper Dooper Land as fun as he promised?
Henry meets a friendly Gorilla. He's moved from the Jungle to the wildlife park for some peace and quiet but his next door neighbour, Tiger, is keeping him up all night.
Football: Stanley helps the kids play their big football match in all weather conditions, escalating into his latest creation - a high tech stadium!
Buttons: Stanley and Little Woo create a special Noisy exhibition at the museum, but all the noises get accidentally mixed up.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
An Fhairsing Sciotaíola: Agus uibheacha sicíní spáis á seachadadh acu, caithfidh an criú dul tríd an Fhairsing Sciotaíola - gaiste gáire!
Breithlá Míshona Duit: Nuair a fhaigheann an criú amach gurb é breithlá Zuzu é, eagraíonn siad cóisir di.
Brandon shows Brewster & Maggie his composter. They wonder 'Why do flies like to hang around stinky stuff?'
Brewster and the gang meet Cod Wriggles and ask 'why is the ocean salty?'
Tugann Peppa agus a cairde cuairt ar Fheirm Mrs Badgers. Taispeánann Mrs Badger dóibh an chaoi a n-oibríonn tarracóirí na feirme.
Tá Peppa agus a teaghlach ar an trá san Astráil don Nollaig in éineacht le Kylie Kangaroo.
Síofra is feeling under the weather today, so Oisín decides to helps her by undertaking her tasks for the day.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters, focusing on Aunt Snug the sheep.
Royston the Mantis feels a little lonely, wishing he had someone to talk to about insect things.
Simon wished he'd gone to bed on time. He is too tired to play with his friends.
AAH! Water Monster: Reggie, who arrived first at the seaside meeting place, peered into the lake to eat fish while waiting for everyone. In the water, he sees the glowing eyes of a monster!
Andy And The Asian Elephants: In an epic adventure and a race against time, Andy Day heads to Bangladesh to help a family of Asian elephants caught in a flood
